paper.title: MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v2 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.integrity_check: Python zipfile testzip passed with no bad member; all five JSONL files parsed successfully as 1,550 total JSON objects.

released_dataset.integrity_observation: Four of five data-file SHA-256 values in data/manifest.json match the archived bytes. objective_fact_judgment.jsonl does not: the manifest declares c6ea7e17df9a90480115c0b7ebf8930aa36a39504acbfa1b650d2be167546f97, while the archived file hashes to cd34eb4136dc9a5e2b4eff742a43de25d50bd1044455160a4b4eea0f082b81bc. This is preserved as an acquisition-time release-integrity observation, not interpreted here.

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The acquired official commit is dated five days after immutable arXiv v2. It is official post-v2 release evidence, not demonstrated byte-identical paper-time code or data. The source-acquisition worker archived and integrity-checked it but did not conduct the queued deep validity audit or reproduce reported results.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded and verified the complete immutable arXiv v2 PDF, API metadata, and HTML; extracted the 43-page PDF with pdftotext -layout; and pinned, downloaded, hashed, inventoried, and integrity-checked the complete official repository archive. No deep paper review, grader audit, result reproduction, memory-capability inference, professional-validity claim, or production-readiness claim is made.
local_storage_note: The PDF and pinned release ZIP are ignored local evidence. The extracted paper text, arXiv metadata/HTML, per-member archive manifest, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable or pinned URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
